control_prompt: brainstorming-product-aware-v1 control: Start a design discussion by asking the user to restate the actor, vocabulary, lifecycle, and desired outcome.
candidate_prompt: brainstorming-product-aware-v1 candidate: Consume the approved contract without repeating resolved product questions. Cite repository evidence, batch independent low-risk choices up to three, ask dependency-changing choices serially, and route only missing or conflicting product truth to product-definition.
